name: ph-balance-lab
description: A fast-paced 2D puzzle game based on acid-base chemistry mechanics. Drag chemical blocks onto each other to create reactions while maintaining pH balance!

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp index.html public/index.html && cp sw.js public/sw.js && cp manifest.json public/manifest.json && cp bgm.mp3 public/bgm.mp3 && cp icon.png public/icon.png
